subject: english
text:
Project Work 
Collect the pictures of famous sports personalities from India.
The Way to Succeed (Poem)
I
Four alternatives are given for each of the following questions/incomplete statements.
Choose the correct alternative.

subject: english
text:
In the first stanza, "aright" most likely means: 
A) With great force.
B) In the correct way.
C) Very quickly.
D) Without hesitation.

subject: english
text:
In the line "Strike with all your might," the word "might" mean: 
A)  Skill.
B)  Speed.
C)  Strength.
D)  Courage.

subject: english
text:
In the first stanza, the boys are encouraged to: 
A)  Hit the nail hard when the iron is hot.
B)  Drive the nail carefully.
C)  Watch others work.
D)  Avoid difficult tasks.

subject: english
text:
According to the second stanza, what is essential when you have work to do? 
A) Taking frequent breaks.
B) Doing it with determination.
C) Seeking help from others.
D) Complaining about the task.

subject: english
text:
What advice is given in the fourth stanza when one stumbles? 
A) To give up and feel disgraced.
B) To blame others for the difficulty.
C) To never be downcast and try again.
D) To find an easier way around.
II
Answer the following questions in one sentence each.

subject: english
text: In the poem, "oft" is used. What is a more common word for "oft"?

subject: english
text: Who is the writer of this poem?

subject: english
text: What are the boys doing while standing at the foot of the hill?

subject: english
text: According to the poem, who must first climb the hill?

subject: english
text:
What is promised if the boys try and try again? 
III Read the following extracts and answer the following questions.

subject: english
text:
“Try, and try again, boys, you’ll succeed at last”. 
a) Who is the speaker?
b) Whom is the speaker addressing?
c) Why does the poet ask boys to try and try again?

subject: english
text:
“They who reached the top, boys, First must climb the hill”. 
a) According to the poet what does top mean?
b) What should one do to reach the top?
c)  What happens when works hard?
